title: Anvil Patch - Evil
description: Repairing, combining, enchanting, and renaming all cost 0 XP with this mod installed.
body:
Repairing, combining, enchanting, and renaming all cost 0 XP with this mod installed.

 

The GUI also shows no XP cost.

 

Currently no config options.

 

(Inspired by Anvil Patch - Lawful by lumberwizard.)

Thanks to https://github.com/mouse0w0/forge-mixin-example for teaching me the ultimate power of Mixins.
